basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.nitrr.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10), B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with minimum 80% marks or 8.5 CGPA (out of 10), GATE/NET including Lectureship (desirable)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10). OR B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with a minimum of 80% marks or 8.5 CGPA (out of 10). GATE/NET including Lectureship is desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10). OR B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with a minimum of 80% marks or 8.5 CGPA (out of 10). GATE/NET including Lectureship is desirable.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow post at NIT Raipur is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent with at least 60% marks, or a B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with at least 80% marks. GATE/NET is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Junior Research Fellow position is scheduled for 5th August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post at NIT Raipur.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.
